question: How many days after Apple announced iOS 27 did Anthropic launch its new Sonnet model?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
iOS 27 was announced by Apple on **June 8, 2026** at WWDC ([Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IOS_27)), and Anthropic launched **Claude Sonnet 5** on **June 30, 2026** ([Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-5), [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/30/anthropic-launches-claude-sonnet-5-as-a-cheaper-way-to-run-agents/)).

That's **22 days** after the iOS 27 announcement.

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
Anthropic launched Claude Sonnet 5 on **June 30, 2026**, **22 days after** Apple announced iOS 27 on **June 8, 2026**.

Sources: [CNET](https://www.cnet.com/tech/services-and-software/apple-wwdc-ios-27-announcement/) · [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-5)
